'''Bala''', a ball of searing rock, was the innermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Aramand system/Legends|Aramand system]]. Despite its inhospitable environment, the [[Aramandi]] managed to establish a colony on the surface of the planet.<ref name="FBS" />

{{Planet-stub}}
